title: jacea rarauensis
intro: Jacea rarauensis, also known as the autumn hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving digestion, due to its high content of inulin and other bioactive compounds. Jacea rarauensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for use in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
